content_es:
# 🕐 Rutina Diaria — [Nombre / Contexto]

## Bloque Matutino (6:00 – 12:00)
| Hora | Actividad | Duración | Prioridad |
|------|-----------|----------|-----------|
| 06:00 | Despertar + Hidratación | 15 min | 🔴 Alta |
| 06:15 | Ejercicio / Estiramiento | 30 min | 🔴 Alta |
| 06:45 | Ducha + Preparación | 30 min | 🟡 Media |
| 07:15 | Desayuno | 20 min | 🔴 Alta |
| 07:35 | Revisión de Agenda | 10 min | 🔴 Alta |
| 08:00 | Bloque de Trabajo Profundo #1 | 2 hrs | 🔴 Alta |
| 10:00 | Pausa activa | 15 min | 🟡 Media |
| 10:15 | Bloque de Trabajo Profundo #2 | 1.5 hrs | 🔴 Alta |

## Bloque Vespertino (12:00 – 18:00)
| Hora | Actividad | Duración | Prioridad |
|------|-----------|----------|-----------|
| 12:00 | Almuerzo | 45 min | 🔴 Alta |
| 12:45 | Caminata / Descanso | 15 min | 🟢 Baja |
| 13:00 | Reuniones / Colaboración | 2 hrs | 🟡 Media |
| 15:00 | Bloque de Aprendizaje | 1 hr | 🟡 Media |
| 16:00 | Tareas administrativas | 1 hr | 🟢 Baja |
| 17:00 | Cierre del día laboral | 30 min | 🔴 Alta |

## Bloque Nocturno (18:00 – 22:00)
| Hora | Actividad | Duración | Prioridad |
|------|-----------|----------|-----------|
| 18:00 | Ejercicio / Hobby | 1 hr | 🟡 Media |
| 19:00 | Cena | 30 min | 🔴 Alta |
| 19:30 | Tiempo personal / Familia | 1.5 hrs | 🔴 Alta |
| 21:00 | Lectura / Reflexión | 30 min | 🟡 Media |
| 21:30 | Preparación para dormir | 30 min | 🔴 Alta |

## Reglas de la Rutina
- ⏰ Sin pantallas después de las 21:30
- 💧 Mínimo 2L de agua al día
- 🎯 Completar al menos 1 tarea de alta prioridad antes del mediodía
content_en:
# 🕐 Daily Routine — [Name / Context]

## Morning Block (6:00 – 12:00)
| Time | Activity | Duration | Priority |
|------|----------|----------|----------|
| 06:00 | Wake up + Hydration | 15 min | 🔴 High |
| 06:15 | Exercise / Stretching | 30 min | 🔴 High |
| 06:45 | Shower + Preparation | 30 min | 🟡 Medium |
| 07:15 | Breakfast | 20 min | 🔴 High |
| 07:35 | Review Agenda | 10 min | 🔴 High |
| 08:00 | Deep Work Block #1 | 2 hrs | 🔴 High |
| 10:00 | Active break | 15 min | 🟡 Medium |
| 10:15 | Deep Work Block #2 | 1.5 hrs | 🔴 High |

## Afternoon Block (12:00 – 18:00)
| Time | Activity | Duration | Priority |
|------|----------|----------|----------|
| 12:00 | Lunch | 45 min | 🔴 High |
| 12:45 | Walk / Rest | 15 min | 🟢 Low |
| 13:00 | Meetings / Collaboration | 2 hrs | 🟡 Medium |
| 15:00 | Learning Block | 1 hr | 🟡 Medium |
| 16:00 | Administrative tasks | 1 hr | 🟢 Low |
| 17:00 | Close work day | 30 min | 🔴 High |

## Evening Block (18:00 – 22:00)
| Time | Activity | Duration | Priority |
|------|----------|----------|----------|
| 18:00 | Exercise / Hobby | 1 hr | 🟡 Medium |
| 19:00 | Dinner | 30 min | 🔴 High |
| 19:30 | Personal time / Family | 1.5 hrs | 🔴 High |
| 21:00 | Reading / Reflection | 30 min | 🟡 Medium |
| 21:30 | Bedtime preparation | 30 min | 🔴 High |

## Routine Rules
- ⏰ No screens after 21:30
- 💧 Minimum 2L of water per day
- 🎯 Complete at least 1 high priority task before noon
